segments.text: In that day you will say:
I will praise you, Lord. Although you were angry with me, your anger has turned away and you have comforted me.
segments.speaker: People of Israel

segments.text: Surely God is my salvation; I will trust and not be afraid. The Lord, the Lord himself, is my strength and my defense; he has become my salvation.
segments.speaker: People of Israel

segments.text: With joy you will draw water from the wells of salvation.
In that day you will say:
Give praise to the Lord, proclaim his name; make known among the nations what he has done, and proclaim that his name is exalted.
segments.speaker: People of Israel

segments.text: Sing to the Lord, for he has done glorious things; let this be known to all the world.
Shout aloud and sing for joy, people of Zion, for great is the Holy One of Israel among you.
segments.speaker: Prophet Isaiah
